articles.title: Lammy says he told JD Vance his Nowak comments were 'wrong'
articles.description: Vance had blamed Henry Nowak's death on the "mass invasion of migrants" - but Lammy says it "has got nothing to do with mass migration".

articles.title: Zelensky criticises 'vile' Chornobyl drone strike ahead of London talks
articles.description: Ukrainian officials say a Russian drone hit a storage facility for spent nuclear fuel near the Chornobyl nuclear plant.

articles.title: Steve Rosenberg: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg
